title: Model Catalog — Provider Pricing-Source Registry
description: A registry (Block H / T35) of AI model providers and their OFFICIAL pricing pages, so every 'indicative — verify with the vendor' caveat in the catalog has a canonical link to check. Categorized (model creators, hyperscalers, inference providers, aggregators) and cross-linked to the catalog vendor key where one exists. Carries URLs only — no prices (the catalog's own per-model `pricing` is the indicative reference; these are the authoritative places to confirm it).

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 date the registry was last updated.

disclaimer.description: Reminder that these are the authoritative pages to verify the catalog's indicative prices against.

providers.description: One entry per provider, in a stable curated order.

id.description: Stable slug, unique across the registry (e.g. openai, groq, aws-bedrock).

category.description: Kind of provider: direct model creator, hyperscaler cloud, fast-inference host, or multi-vendor gateway/aggregator.

catalogVendor.description: The catalog vendor key this provider maps to (its models appear under that key), or null if the provider is not yet represented in the catalog.

consumerPlansUrl.description: Official consumer subscription-plans page, when the provider sells one.

note.description: Optional qualifier (e.g. 'gateway re-serving other vendors', 'via Model Studio').
